suggestions.name: AEP Plantations Plc
suggestions.suggestion: Add Companies House filed-accounts PDF fetch and text extract for UK-listed names when `filings_bodies` count is zero — unlocks pension notes, contingencies, going-concern, and governance sections missing from RNS headlines.

suggestions.name: AEP Plantations Plc
suggestions.suggestion: Re-pull full Investegate/RNS HTML or PDF bodies for indexed items tagged “FY25 Results”, “interim”, and “annual report” rather than Google News wrapper URLs; current index lists 31 filings with `with_body: 0`.

suggestions.name: AEP Plantations Plc
suggestions.suggestion: Fetch company IR results presentations and investor PDFs (themed alternate-news queries returned no usable PDFs) to bridge FCF, segment margin, and post-M&A funding.

suggestions.name: AEP Plantations Plc
suggestions.suggestion: Override sector classification for plantation/agricultural issuers (e.g. map to Agriculture/Commodities) so Consumer Defensive peer-relative scores are not applied to palm-oil producers with demonstrated revenue cyclicality.

suggestions.name: AEP Plantations Plc
suggestions.suggestion: When `annual: 0` in `filings_index.json`, auto-emit a structured “primary accounts missing” flag in gap-fill and cap research confidence until Companies House or IR PDF is ingested.

suggestions.name: Hikma Pharmaceuticals PLC
suggestions.suggestion: Fetch Hikma IR results presentation and annual-report PDFs from hikma.com and extract cash-flow bridge tables, segment margins, and dividend-policy text into `filings/bodies/`.

suggestions.name: Hikma Pharmaceuticals PLC
suggestions.suggestion: Re-classify UK RNS items by headline pattern (Full Year Results, Half Year, Trading Update) and download PDF bodies from Investegate/LSE direct URLs when Ticker RNS API returns empty text.

suggestions.name: Hikma Pharmaceuticals PLC
suggestions.suggestion: Ingest Companies House filed accounts for Hikma Pharmaceuticals PLC to capture pension, covenant, and going-concern language missing from the RNS index.

suggestions.name: Hikma Pharmaceuticals PLC
suggestions.suggestion: Add healthcare overlay flag when trailing FCF is negative AND Piotroski F-Score ≤ 4 — cap adjusted signal at neutral/caution despite composite Strong Buy.

suggestions.name: Hikma Pharmaceuticals PLC
suggestions.suggestion: Require gap-fill memos to reconcile screen trailing FCF vs Yahoo annual FCF explicitly, with currency label (USD vs GBP), before answering dividend-safety questions.

suggestions.name: Hikma Pharmaceuticals PLC
suggestions.suggestion: The memo at `output/research/HIK.L/research.md` has been updated to version 2 (gap_fill mode) with these sections. Verdict moved from **accumulate** to **caution** (confidence 0.62), reflecting that local sources confirm the cash-flow red flags without resolving them.

suggestions.name: ME Group International plc
suggestions.suggestion: Download and text-extract PDF bodies from `ticker_rns_api` URLs in `filings_index.json` (currently 52 indexed, 0 bodies); filter mis-attributed Google News headlines by company name/ticker before indexing.

suggestions.name: ME Group International plc
suggestions.suggestion: Populate `operating_cashflow` in `CompanyMetrics` from Yahoo cash-flow statements — MEGP.L shows OCF £90.8m in `financials_annual.json` but `None` in fetch, causing false Piotroski/Earnings Quality failures.

suggestions.name: ME Group International plc
suggestions.suggestion: Fetch company IR results presentation PDF from `photo-me.co.uk` investor pages (listed in `gap_fill_source_map.json` → `company_ir_presentation`) for segment tables, dividend policy, and H1 cash-flow bridges missing from Yahoo.

suggestions.name: ME Group International plc
suggestions.suggestion: When statutory FY growth (Yahoo) and trailing `earnings_growth` (yfinance) diverge by >5pp, flag a "momentum mismatch" overlay and cap conviction — MEGP shows +4.6% FY NI growth vs −3.9% screen input.

suggestions.name: ME Group International plc
suggestions.suggestion: Require gap-fill memos to cross-check dividend cover on both OCF and FCF explicitly, and state which metric the High Dividend Yield model implicitly assumes — MEGP passes dividend models despite FCF cover <1× on statutory data.
